User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user (seller or buyer) in the marketplace.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

Book.title: Book
Book.description: Represents a book listed for sale or donation.

id.description: The unique ID of the book listing.

sellerId.description: The UID of the seller who listed the book.

price.description: The price of the book (0 if donation).

front.description: Base64 or URL of the front image.

back.description: Base64 or URL of the back image.

side.description: Base64 or URL of the side image.

open.description: Base64 or URL of an open book image.

status.description: The current status of the book.

isDonation.description: Whether the book is for donation.

pdfUrl.description: URL to the PDF if it's a digital resource.

Offer.title: Offer
Offer.description: Represents a bargain offer from a buyer to a seller.

id.description: The unique ID of the offer.

bookId.description: The ID of the book being bargained for.

buyerId.description: The UID of the buyer making the offer.

sellerId.description: The UID of the seller receiving the offer.

offeredPrice.description: The price offered by the buyer.
